# grclanker

> Open-source spec.md files for building GRC compliance automations. Each spec describes a Go CLI tool that audits vendor security configs against FedRAMP, CMMC, SOC 2, CIS, PCI-DSS, and STIG controls.

## Specs

All specs are available as raw markdown. Point your agent at any URL below.

- [AWS Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/aws-sec-inspector.spec.md): Multi-framework security compliance audit tool for AWS environments
- [Azure Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/azure-sec-inspector.spec.md): Azure subscriptions and M365 tenants via Graph API, ARM, Defender for Cloud
- [Box Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/box-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication policies, sharing controls, data governance, device trust
- [Cloudflare Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/cloudflare-sec-inspector.spec.md): WAF configs, Zero Trust policies, SSL/TLS, DNS security
- [CrowdStrike Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/crowdstrike-sec-inspector.spec.md): Falcon EDR prevention policies, sensor deployment, device control
- [Datadog Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/datadog-sec-inspector.spec.md): RBAC, API key management, log pipelines, security monitoring
- [Duo Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/duo-sec-inspector.spec.md): MFA configurations, policies, user enrollment, trust monitor alerts
- [Elastic Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/elastic-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication realms, TLS configs, RBAC, field/document-level security
- [GCP Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/gcp-sec-inspector.spec.md): GCP infrastructure, IAM policies, encryption, org constraints
- [GitHub Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/github-sec-inspector.spec.md): Enterprise Cloud SSO, branch protection, code security, Actions workflows
- [Google Workspace Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/gws-inspector-go.spec.md): Multi-framework compliance audit for Google Workspace
- [KnowBe4 Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/knowbe4-sec-inspector.spec.md): Security awareness training coverage, completion rates, user risk scores
- [LaunchDarkly Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/launchdarkly-sec-inspector.spec.md): IAM, feature flag hygiene, API token lifecycle
- [MuleSoft Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/mulesoft-sec-inspector.spec.md): Anypoint Platform IAM, API gateway policies, runtime security
- [New Relic Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/newrelic-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication, user access controls, API key management
- [OCI Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/oci-sec-inspector.spec.md): OCI IAM, networking, Cloud Guard posture, vault key management
- [PagerDuty Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/pagerduty-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication settings, user roles, access controls
- [Palo Alto Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/paloalto-sec-inspector.spec.md): Prisma Cloud CSPM/CWPP and PAN-OS firewalls
- [Qualys Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/qualys-sec-inspector.spec.md): Vuln management configs, compliance profiles, scan coverage
- [Salesforce Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/salesforce-sec-inspector.spec.md): Security settings, user permissions, auth policies
- [ServiceNow Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/servicenow-sec-inspector.spec.md): Platform security configs, ACL rules, user/role management
- [Slack Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/slack-sec-inspector.spec.md): Enterprise Grid SSO, MFA policies, DLP settings
- [Snowflake Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/snowflake-sec-inspector.spec.md): IAM, network security, data protection policies, encryption
- [Splunk Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/splunk-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication, authorization, server settings, data pipelines
- [Sumo Logic Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/sumologic-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication policies, access controls, data governance
- [Tenable Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/tenable-sec-inspector.spec.md): Scan policies, asset coverage, credential audits
- [Veracode Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/veracode-sec-inspector.spec.md): Scan coverage, policy compliance, flaw aging, SCA library health
- [Webex Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/webex-sec-inspector.spec.md): IAM, messaging policies, meeting security, recording governance
- [Zendesk Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/zendesk-sec-inspector.spec.md): Authentication settings, agent access controls, audit logging
- [Zoom Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/zoom-sec-inspector.spec.md): Meeting policies, recording controls, auth enforcement
- [Zscaler Security Inspector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hackIDLE/grclanker/main/specs/zscaler-sec-inspector.spec.md): ZIA and ZPA URL filtering, DLP policies, SSL inspection

## How to use

Point any AI coding agent at a raw spec URL above. The spec contains everything needed to build the tool: APIs, authentication, security controls, framework mappings, architecture, and build sequence.

## Source

- Website: https://grclanker.com
- Repository: https://github.com/hackIDLE/grclanker
- Clone all specs: git clone https://github.com/hackIDLE/grclanker.git
